title: tagetes fevillei
intro: Tagetes fevillei, also known as Mexican Marigold or Zempasúchil, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. Native to Mexico, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Tagetes fevillei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Tagetes fevillei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues.
